title: Currently Obsessed with Sakura Lala
excerpt: You know how there are some things you don't think could get any better? Like washi tape, for example? I mean, I have amassed a ridiculous amount of the sticky stuff and still cannot get enough of it. And just…
body: You know how there are some things you don't think could get any better? Like washi tape, for example? I mean, I have amassed a ridiculous amount of the sticky stuff and still cannot get enough of it. And just when I thought I was tapering off adding to the collection, in comes camera shaped washi tape! And it's sold through a brand new online shop based in Hawaii called Sakura Lala.
